_comment: Maps each swarm role to a model tier. The orchestrator reads this and sets the `model` field per subagent stage. Fill in the tier values with model identifiers available in YOUR Kiro environment (run your provider's model list). Leave a tier null to inherit the session default — safe out of the box, so nothing breaks until you opt in.
notes: Rationale: light roles (research, critique, docs, planning) run well on a fast/cheap model; code review is mid; code, architecture, and integration get the strongest model. This is the biggest speed+cost lever with zero infrastructure. Tune freely.
